info.name: LEAD-93 v2 Contract - Configurable Fail-Fast Lifecycle Run
info.description: Configuration-driven v2 regression. Independent requests run first, the dependency workflow runs in explicit order, and Cleanup is protected from skip rules.

item.name: 01 Independent Queries
item.description: Requests with no test-run ID dependency. They execute before data creation.

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Channel list is available', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

pm.test('Initial Draft/Admin list is readable', function () { pm.expect(json.data.dataList).to.be.an('array'); });

item.name: 04 Preflight - Category Tree and Initialise Run

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Category tree is available', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.be.an('array'); });

if (json.responseCode === '00000000') { const order = json.data.map((item, index) => ({categoryId: String(item.id ?? item.categoryId), sortOrder: index + 1})); pm.environment.set('initialRootOrderJson', JSON.stringify(order)); }

item.name: 05 Preflight - Tag Taxonomy and Select Valid Tags

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

pm.test('Four mandatory tag groups are available', function () { const expected = ['CONTENT_TYPE', 'TRIGGER', 'LIFECYCLE_STAGE', 'FINANCIAL_NEED']; pm.expect(json.data).to.have.lengthOf(4); pm.expect(json.data.map(group => group.groupCode)).to.have.members(expected); pm.expect(json.data.every(group => Number(group.isMandatory ?? group.mandatory) === 1)).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('Trigger selection cap is five', function () { const trigger = json.data.find(group => group.groupCode === 'TRIGGER'); pm.expect(trigger.maxSelections).to.eql(5); });

if (json.responseCode === '00000000') { const selected = json.data.map(group => { const values = group.tagValues || group.values || []; return {groupCode: group.groupCode, tagCodes: Number(group.isMandatory ?? group.mandatory ?? 0) === 1 && values.length ? [values[0].tagCode] : []}; }); pm.environment.set('testTagGroupsJson', JSON.stringify(selected)); }

item.name: 02 Dependency Workflow
item.description: Explicit ordered lifecycle. The runner stops at the first failed request or assertion.

pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

pm.test('Save Draft does not submit Template metadata', function () { const body = JSON.parse(pm.request.body.raw || '{}'); ['categoryId', 'subCategoryIds', 'tagGroups'].forEach(field => pm.expect(body).not.to.have.property(field)); });
pm.test('V1 Draft identifiers were returned', function () { pm.expect(json.data.version).to.eql('V1'); pm.expect(json.data.emailCode).to.exist; });

pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

pm.test('Current metadata update result is returned', function () { pm.expect(String(json.data.emailCode)).to.eql(pm.environment.get('testEmailCode')); pm.expect(json.data.subCategoryIds).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(json.data.tagGroupCount).to.eql(4); pm.expect(json.data.status).to.eql('success'); });
if (missing.length) { console.warn(`Request skipped because prior setup failed: ${missing.join(', ')}`); pm.execution.skipRequest(); }

pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

pm.test('V1 Detail is Draft and belongs to this run', function () { pm.expect(String(json.data.emailCode)).to.eql(pm.environment.get('testEmailCode')); pm.expect(json.data.version).to.eql('V1'); pm.expect(json.data.versionStatus).to.eql(3); });
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });

pm.test('Temporary template is present in admin list', function () { pm.expect(json.data.dataList.some(item => String(item.emailCode) === pm.environment.get('testEmailCode'))).to.eql(true); });

exec: console.warn('Write request skipped. Set enableWriteTests=true in the selected environment.');
if (missing.length) { console.warn(`Request skipped because prior setup failed: ${missing.join(', ')}`); pm.execution.skipRequest(); }
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

pm.test('Independent Copy V1 Draft was created', function () { pm.expect(json.data.version).to.eql('V1'); pm.expect(json.data.versionStatus).to.eql(3); pm.expect(String(json.data.emailCode)).not.to.eql(pm.environment.get('testEmailCode')); });
if (missing.length) { console.warn(`Request skipped because prior setup failed: ${missing.join(', ')}`); pm.execution.skipRequest(); }

pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

pm.test('Copied Template is independently readable', function () { pm.expect(String(json.data.emailCode)).to.eql(pm.environment.get('copyEmailCode')); pm.expect(json.data.versionStatus).to.eql(3); });

variable.value: ["Cleanup - Delete Copied Template","Cleanup - Delete Primary Template","Verify Temporary Templates Removed","Cleanup Fallback - Delete Unused Category if Needed","Cleanup Fallback - Delete Source Category if Needed","Cleanup - Delete Target Category","Final Verification - No Temporary Categories Remain"]

exec: try { configuredSkips = JSON.parse(pm.variables.get('configuredSkipRequestNamesJson') || '[]'); } catch (error) { throw new Error('configuredSkipRequestNamesJson is invalid JSON'); }
try { protectedCleanup = JSON.parse(pm.variables.get('cleanupRequestNamesJson') || '[]'); } catch (error) { throw new Error('cleanupRequestNamesJson is invalid JSON'); }
if (skipRequested && protectedCleanup.includes(requestBaseName)) { console.warn(`Ignored skip rule for protected Cleanup request: ${pm.info.requestName}`); }
if (skipRequested && !protectedCleanup.includes(requestBaseName)) { console.warn(`Skipped by v2 orchestration configuration: ${pm.info.requestName}`); pm.execution.skipRequest(); }
